name: Hearty Spinach and Tofu Risotto
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Spinach, frozen, chopped --thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tofu in a blender container. Cover and blend until smooth.
2. In a large saucepan, cook onion and garlic in hot oil until the onion is tender.
3. Add undrained tomatoes and oregano. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
4. Simmer uncovered for about 3 minutes.
5. Stir in tofu, rice, spinach (1/2 tsp salt and 1/4 tsp pepper).
6. Divide the mixture into 4 individual greased casseroles or place all of the mixture in a greased 1 1/2-quart casserole.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
8. Top with sesame seeds. Makes 4 servings.
